# STEADYWRK
> Jordan's AI-native career platform. Where ambition compounds.

## Company
- Name: STEADYWRK (Kayan Ventures Jordan LLC)
- Domain: steadywrk.app
- Location: Building 15, King Hussein Business Park, Amman, Jordan
- Founded: 2026
- Industry: AI career platform, BPO, digital marketing, facility management

## What We Do
STEADYWRK is an AI-native startup platform that connects ambitious Jordanian talent — especially women 18-30 — with elite training, rapid professional development, and meaningful work serving US clients. We operate four verticals: AI Lab & Studio, Facility Management, Digital Marketing, and AI BPO.

## Programs
- IGNITE (3-month internship): Immersive AI-native internship. Ship production work from week one.
- ORBIT (6-month fellowship): Deep technical fellowship. Lead projects, mentor juniors, build systems.
- APEX (12-month leadership track): Strategic leadership. Architect solutions, drive teams, shape direction.

## Hiring
We are actively hiring in Amman, Jordan for:
- AI Engineer (AI Lab, Full-time)
- Frontend Developer (Engineering, Full-time)
- Digital Marketing Lead (Growth, Full-time)
- BPO Operations Manager (Operations, Full-time)
- AI BPO Agent (BPO, Contract)

Apply via WhatsApp or email hello@steadywrk.app.

## Technology
Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, Vercel, Cloudflare Workers.

## Key Facts
- Jordan produces ~7,000 technology graduates annually
- 46% youth unemployment (15-24), 66% for young women
- Jordan ranks 3rd in Arab world for AI adoption in public sector
- 92.5% internet penetration, primarily mobile
- KHBP is at 100% occupancy with Phase Two expansion underway

## Contact
- Website: https://steadywrk.app
- Email: hello@steadywrk.app
- Instagram: @steadywrk
- LinkedIn: /company/steadywrk
